sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82200" key="perissoxorhgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισσο-χορηγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extra largess</tr_> of corn, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.26.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
